PreToolUse.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; & (Join-Path $root 'scripts/codex.ps1') hook risk"

SessionStart.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; & (Join-Path $root 'scripts/codex.ps1') hook session-start"

PostToolUse.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; & (Join-Path $root 'scripts/codex.ps1') hook post-tool-capture"

Stop.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; & (Join-Path $root 'scripts/codex.ps1') hook stop-check"
